title: Shimrra's Citadel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Citadel}}
[[File:JacenOnimi.jpg|thumb|right|330px|Onimi defeated by Jacen Solo inside the Citadel's coffer.]]
'''Shimrra's Citadel''' was the palace of [[Shimrra Jamaane]], the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], after his arrival on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], which had been renamed [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. It was based in the [[Sacred Precinct]], close to the remains of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]].

==Characteristics==
Originally a [[Koros-Strohna]], the Citadel was capable of returning to space if the need arose. It had a spire of [[yorik coral]] on the top, giving it the appearance of a mountain, and flew "up right" in space. [[Dovin basal]]s manipulated the area around the Citadel to give the appearance that rainbows were emanating from it.

There were separate entrances for the four ruling [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|castes]], all of which ended at the [[Hall of Confluence]], Shimrra's public throne room, where Shimrra would hold court with the [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elite]]. Elsewhere in the Citadel, the [[Warmaster's command grotto]] was grown for the [[Warmaster]] of the Yuuzhan Vong, so that he could prepare for an assault.

At the top of the spire were Shimrra's private quarters, his coffer, and a [[yorik-trema]] that served as his personal escape pod. The private throne room had a moat of [[black]] Yuuzhan Vong [[Blood/Legends|blood]] between the entrance and Shimrra's [[Moonbeam Throne|throne]]. In both the Hall of Confluence and the coffer, there were [[dovin basal]]s that caused the gravity to increase as they approached the [[hau polyp]] throne, making those who approached the [[Supreme Overlord]] feel like they were walking uphill. The [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] [[Onimi]], Shimrra's jester who was the true Supreme Overlord, was capable of manipulating the Citadel independently of a [[yammosk]], [[dhuryam]], or even Shimrra's own control.

==History==
During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the Citadel was breached by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] troops, including [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]] and [[YVH 1]] droids, thus defiling the structure. The Citadel was linked to Onimi, so it self-destructed after he died.
